title: Official R-LAB.OVH
description:
This is the modpack of R-LAB.OVH.
Join discord and enjoy our server!
body:
# **[NEW] R-LAB.OVH Official Cobblemon Modpack**  

![Cobblemon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d387c8f41956ded50499d207fa7e571f506f3ed8.jpeg)

🎮 **Welcome to the official Cobblemon modpack for R-LAB.OVH!** 🎮  

This modpack is designed to provide the best Cobblemon experience with carefully selected mods that enhance gameplay while maintaining a smooth and balanced adventure.  
![img](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc09f2fafd636f34e7462b823984513cddab2ce1.png)
## ✨ Features:  
- ✅ **Optimized performance** for seamless gameplay  
- ✅ **Quality-of-life improvements** for a better experience  
- ✅ **Enhancements** to exploration, building, and Pokémon interactions  
- ✅ **Fully compatible** with the official **R-LAB.OVH** server  


![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/212b7fff73988c6cd0c615b6ec0ecc34ef501ca8.webp)
## 🔗 Join the server today:  
`Join Discord to be whitelisted`  
![img](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc09f2fafd636f34e7462b823984513cddab2ce1.png)
![Install](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c311bd925bbdfc6b17b13f7f416fc67ef114caf.jpeg)

## 📥 Installation:  
1. **Download and install** this modpack via Modrinth  
2. **Launch and enjoy** Cobblemon with the best settings pre-configured!  
   
![img](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc09f2fafd636f34e7462b823984513cddab2ce1.png)
## 🛠️ Need help? Have suggestions?  
Join our community and let us know!  
![img](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc09f2fafd636f34e7462b823984513cddab2ce1.png)
🚀 **Catch 'em all and start your adventure today!** 🚀
